name: Almond Macaroon Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat cream cheese and 2 tablespoons butter or margarine until softened. Add 1/4 cup sugar.
2. Stir in 1 egg, 1 tablespoon flour, and coconut flakes.
3. Chop almonds; reserve 16 for garnish. Stir in 1/3 of the chopped almonds. Set aside.
4. Melt 5 chocolate squares and remaining butter or margarine over low heat until melted. Remove from heat.
5. Stir in 1/2 cup sugar, vanilla extract, 1/2 cup flour, baking powder, and salt.
6. Add remaining chopped almonds to the batter.
7. Spread chocolate batter evenly in a greased 8x8 square pan. Spread cheese batter on top.
8. Garnish with whole almonds.
9. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until the center is done (do not overbake).
10. Cool in the pan. Cut into bars.
